01 / About

Who I Am

BTech CSE · GLA Univ

Building apps people actually enjoy using.

Hey, I'm Naman — a Computer Science undergrad at GLA University, Mathura with a genuine obsession for mobile development. My journey started with building small Flutter UIs just for fun, and it quickly turned into a full-on passion for creating seamless, intuitive experiences on Android and iOS.

Right now, I'm on a mission to go full-stack. I've got the mobile and frontend side covered, and I'm actively levelling up on Node.js, REST APIs, and databases. The goal? Being able to take an idea from a Figma wireframe all the way to a deployed, working product — solo.

I love the problem-solving side of this craft as much as the creative side. Whether it's debugging a tricky state management issue in Flutter or designing a clean API schema, I'm in my element. Always learning, always shipping.

Flutter React Native Dart JavaScript HTML / CSS Node.js (learning) Problem Solver Mobile-First
